Alan is assisting with the party preparations. Peter is also assisting in making the preparations for the party. Charles has got a commission to write an article on Picasso for an art magazine. He's doing research in preparation for the article. Championships like this need proper preparation. The poster and the promo video are in preparation. Dan is doing careful preparation for the fight as he didn't perform well in his last fight because he did little preparation. John didn't seem to have done much preparation for his last fight too. He almost lost the match so this time he's doing thorough preparation for it including grappling, wrestling and kickboxing as well as cardio training. Sparring regularly is ideal preparation for a match. You cannot fight a high level fighter in a championship without adequate preparation. My friend Joe is making preparations for his ski trip to Fukuoka. He's also making preparations to meet his favourite band X Japan in Tokyo. So he's preoccupied with these preparations.
